Profile: NetBird is an open-source overlay network built on WireGuard. This plugin runs the official NetBird client as a native Unraid system service, so the host itself becomes a peer on your NetBird network — no Docker container, no extra hop. NetBird netbirdio/netbird-unraid https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird-unraid https://github.com/netbirdio/netbird-unraid/discussions https://netbird.io https://twitter.com/netbird https://raw.githubusercontent.com/netbirdio/netbird-unraid/main/src/usr/local/emhttp/plugins/netbird/netbird.png
